name: list_documents
description: Lists all available documents in the Context Pack.

name: read_document
description: Reads the contents and frontmatter of a specific document.

name: create_document
description: Creates a new document in the Context Pack.

name: update_document
description: Updates an existing document in the Context Pack.

name: delete_document
description: Deletes a document from the Context Pack.

name: validate_bundle
description: Validates the structural integrity of the entire Context Pack.

name: migrate_bundle
description: Migrates the Context Pack to the latest schema version.

name: rebuild_indexes
description: Rebuilds index.md files for progressive disclosure.

name: build_context_pack
description: Selects and compresses documents to fit within a given token budget.
